pipeline_stage: Part A — UI Art (icon-generation + portrait-generation) + hourglass priority
language_policy: HTML输出语言: zh-CN；游戏内专有名词保留日文；JSON字段名保持英文snake_case

ui_assets.name: HUD底栏
ui_assets.spec_summary: Island sand fill #F7EDD8，木质边框 #8B6030，软阴影。左：沙滩币图标+数字；中：步数计数器（critical 状态变为 #C85A40 快速脉动）；右：3个辅助按钮（重排/预判/续关，各 80×80px，珊瑚渐变，24px 圆角）。HUD 固定在棋盘下方，高度 80px。
ui_assets.prompt: Game UI HUD bar, 720×80px, transparent background. Island sand color #F7EDD8 fill, warm wood border #8B6030 2px. Left zone: round coin icon slot + numeric counter. Center: step counter text area. Right: 3 button slots 80×80px each with coral gradient. Hand-drawn watercolor style, rounded corners, soft shadow. No text baked in. Healing Japanese island aesthetic.
ui_assets.negative_prompt: pixel art, neon, metallic chrome, pure black, sharp corners, hyper-realistic 3D

ui_assets.name: 关卡卡片
ui_assets.spec_summary: 320×180px 关卡卡片。Island sand 底色，木质边框，16px 圆角，软阴影。显示：关卡编号（粗体深棕），3颗星（空/满），章节缩略图（若有）。locked 态：灰底+锁图标；new 态：金色边框+NEW 徽章；selected 态：珊瑚边框+放大阴影。
ui_assets.prompt: Game level selection card, 320×180px, transparent background. Warm sand background #F7EDD8, wood border frame #8B6030 2px, 16px corner radius. Card shows 3-star rating area and chapter thumbnail space. Hand-drawn watercolor style, soft drop shadow. No text. Healing Japanese island aesthetic.
ui_assets.negative_prompt: pixel art, neon, metallic, pure black, sharp corners, hyper-realistic

ui_assets.name: 重排按钮
ui_assets.spec_summary: 80×80px 圆角（24px）按钮。normal：珊瑚渐变 #F0997A→#E8866A，重排旋转箭头图标（白），'重排' 标签（11sp 白），木质描边，软阴影。pressed：加深色+Y轴+2px 位移，缩放 0.97。disabled（余额<30）：沙色 #C8B8A0，图标灰，opacity 0.6。locked：disabled + 锁叠加。
ui_assets.prompt: Square game button 80×80px, transparent background. Coral gradient fill #F0997A to #E8866A top-to-bottom, rounded corners 24px, white circular shuffle/rotation arrow icon centered, warm wood border outline #8B6030 1.5px, soft drop shadow. Hand-drawn watercolor style. No text baked in.
ui_assets.negative_prompt: pixel art, neon, metallic, pure black, sharp corners

ui_assets.name: 预判按钮
ui_assets.spec_summary: 80×80px 圆角（24px）按钮。same palette 同重排按钮，图标改为放大镜/眼睛（预判路径高亮），'预判' 标签（11sp 白）。状态机与重排按钮相同。
ui_assets.prompt: Square game button 80×80px, transparent background. Coral gradient fill #F0997A to #E8866A, rounded corners 24px, white magnifying glass eye icon centered, warm wood border #8B6030 1.5px, soft drop shadow. Hand-drawn watercolor style. No text.
ui_assets.negative_prompt: pixel art, neon, metallic, pure black, sharp corners

ui_assets.name: 续关按钮
ui_assets.spec_summary: 80×80px 圆角（24px）按钮。normal：沙色调（opacity 0.7，常驻低亮度）。highlighted（步数归零时激活）：完整珊瑚渐变+金色边框 #F5C842+金色脉动光晕。disabled（余额<30）：灰色 opacity 0.5。locked（禅境关）：dim opacity 0.3+锁图标。
ui_assets.prompt: Square game button 80×80px, transparent background. Sand-muted color #F7EDD8 at 70% opacity (normal state), rounded corners 24px, white +5 steps icon centered, warm border outline, soft shadow. Hand-drawn watercolor style. No text.
ui_assets.negative_prompt: pixel art, neon, metallic, pure black, sharp corners

ui_assets.name: 商店面板
ui_assets.spec_summary: 480×640px 弹窗面板（居中显示于深海蓝遮罩 50% 之上）。木质暖沙底色 #E8D8B4，木质边框 3px #8B6030，20px 圆角，大软阴影。顶部：标题'商店'+关闭按钮。内容区：道具行列表（重排/预判/续关）。每行：图标+名称+说明+沙滩币价格（金色硬币图标+数字）。进入动画：scale_0.7→1.05→1.0 spring 0.4s。
ui_assets.prompt: Game shop panel popup, 480×640px, transparent background. Warm wood-sand background #E8D8B4, decorative wood border frame #8B6030 3px, 20px corner radius, large soft drop shadow. Panel has header zone and content rows area. Hand-drawn watercolor style, island-themed wooden sign aesthetic. No text. Healing Japanese island.
ui_assets.negative_prompt: pixel art, neon, metallic chrome, pure black, sharp corners, hyper-realistic

ui_assets.name: NPC对话框
ui_assets.spec_summary: 720×200px 底部对话框。木质暖沙底色 #E8D8B4，顶部边框 2px #8B6030。NPC名称（16sp #8B6030）+对话文本（15sp #3A2810）。右下角点击继续提示（漂木金 #C4955A）。
ui_assets.prompt: Game dialogue box, 720×200px, transparent background. Warm sand-wood background #E8D8B4, top border accent line #8B6030 2px, subtle corner decoration elements, right-aligned continue arrow area. Hand-drawn watercolor style. No text. Bottom-anchored UI panel, healing Japanese island aesthetic.
ui_assets.negative_prompt: pixel art, neon, metallic, pure black, sharp corners

ui_assets.name: 沙滩币图标
ui_assets.spec_summary: 64×64px 圆形沙滩币图标。贝壳造型金黄色圆形硬币，带涟漪光晕，暖橙色 #F5C842。填充：漂木金内嵌贝壳/波纹纹样，有机手绘轮廓（暖棕色非纯黑），软投影。透明背景。唯一货币符号，HUD 和商店均引用此图标。
ui_assets.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor beach coin icon, 64×64px, transparent background. Round coin shape, golden yellow #F5C842 fill, warm sand texture overlay, shell or ripple wave embossed pattern in driftwood #C4955A. Organic hand-drawn outline in warm brown. Soft drop shadow. Clean readable at 32px. No text. Healing Japanese island aesthetic.
ui_assets.negative_prompt: pixel art, neon, metallic chrome, pure black outline, sharp edges, text overlay

ui_assets.name: 星星图标
ui_assets.spec_summary: 64×64px 五角星图标，三态：[空心：沙灰 #C4B090 填充，棕色描边] [满星：金黄 #F5C842，琥珀描边，软光晕] [半星：左金右灰]。有机圆端角，手绘水彩风格。透明背景。
ui_assets.prompt_filled: Hand-drawn watercolor 5-point star icon, 64×64px, transparent background. Golden yellow #F5C842 fill, warm amber stroke #C4955A 2px, soft inner glow, organic round-tipped star shape. Healing Japanese island aesthetic. No text.
ui_assets.prompt_empty: Hand-drawn watercolor 5-point star icon outline, 64×64px, transparent background. Grey-sand #C4B090 fill, brown outline #8B6030 2px. Same organic shape as filled variant. No text.
ui_assets.prompt_half: Hand-drawn watercolor 5-point star icon, 64×64px, transparent background. Left half golden #F5C842, right half grey-sand #C4B090, split at center vertical axis. Organic round-tipped star shape. No text.
ui_assets.negative_prompt: pixel art, neon, metallic, pure black, sharp geometric star, text overlay

ui_assets.name: 灯塔进度条
ui_assets.spec_summary: 120×480px 竖向灯塔进度条。圆角轨道（8px），木质边框，顶部灯塔小图标（chapter 进度满后发光）。填充色：空=沙灰 #C8B8A0，低=竹绿 #7DBE77（25-100%），满=金黄 #F5C842+光晕。进度变化：smooth expand + 金色闪光 0.3s。章节修复完成：灯塔图标发光脉动。
ui_assets.prompt: Vertical lighthouse progress bar widget, 120×480px, transparent background. Rounded track 8px radius, warm wood border, small lighthouse icon at top. Track fill color bamboo green #7DBE77. Background sand grey #C8B8A0 unfilled. Hand-drawn watercolor style, organic forms. Healing Japanese island aesthetic. No text.
ui_assets.negative_prompt: pixel art, neon, metallic, pure black, sharp corners

hourglass_widget.name: 沙漏奖励组件
hourglass_widget.placement: 主界面/地图界面显眼位置（靠近岛屿地图中心或HUD角落）

states.description: 沙子全在底部，顶部玻璃腔为空，静止无动画
states.visual: 沙粒堆积在底部腔，顶部腔完全透明，玻璃无光晕，椰树装饰稍暗
states.animation: static — 轻微idle呼吸 scale 0.99-1.01, 周期4s
states.prompt: Cute island-themed hourglass widget, 160×200px, transparent background. Glass hourglass body with warm amber sand at BOTTOM only, top chamber empty and clear. Rounded glass frame with warm brown borders #8B6030, small palm tree decoration on top, coral reef base at bottom. No glow effects. Muted, waiting state. Hand-drawn watercolor style. No text.
states.negative_prompt: pixel art, neon, pure black, sharp corners, hyper-realistic 3D, glowing

states.description: 沙粒从顶部腔缓缓落下，底部沙堆增高中，三个子态（25%/50%/75%填充）
states.visual: 顶部腔沙粒逐渐减少，底部腔沙堆增高。中间颈部有流沙颗粒动画。玻璃边缘有微弱暖色光晕
states.animation: particle_fall — 沙粒以 2-3px 圆点从颈部落下，速度60px/s，偶尔随机左右偏移±3px。底部沙堆高度每帧微增

sub_states.prompt: Island-themed hourglass, 160×200px, transparent background. 25% filled — sand 25% in bottom chamber, 75% remaining in top. Warm amber sand #F0A830, tiny sand particles falling through narrow neck. Glass frame with organic warm borders, palm tree top decoration, coral reef base. Soft warm glow on glass edges. Hand-drawn watercolor style.

Island-themed hourglass, 160×200px, transparent background. 50% filled — sand evenly split between top and bottom chambers. Warm amber sand #F0A830, flowing particles at neck. Glass frame warm borders, palm tree top, coral base. Gentle warm glow. Hand-drawn watercolor style.

Island-themed hourglass, 160×200px, transparent background. 75% filled — mostly full, 75% sand in bottom chamber, small amount remaining in top. Warm amber sand #F0A830, light trickle at neck. Glass frame, palm tree top, coral base. Warm golden glow on lower chamber. Hand-drawn watercolor style.

states.negative_prompt: pixel art, neon, pure black, sharp corners, hyper-realistic 3D

states.description: 沙子全部在底部，顶部腔完全空，边缘金色脉动发光，轻微弹跳动画
states.visual: 底部腔满沙堆积，顶部腔完全透明，玻璃边缘发出暖金色 #F5C842 脉动光晕，椰树装饰金色高亮
states.animation: glow_pulse — 光晕 0.6s周期脉动，scale 0.98-1.04弹跳，每3s一次轻跳。徽章感叹号持续显示
states.badge: 感叹号徽章 — 右上角红底白感叹号 24×24px
states.prompt: Island-themed hourglass FULL state, 160×200px, transparent background. All sand at BOTTOM chamber, top chamber completely empty and clear. Warm amber sand #F0A830 in full bottom. Glass frame glowing with warm golden light #F5C842 pulsing aura on edges. Palm tree decoration at top glowing golden. Coral reef base. Exclamation badge upper-right. Hand-drawn watercolor style, magical glow effect.
states.negative_prompt: pixel art, neon, pure black, sharp corners, hyper-realistic 3D

states.description: 玩家点击后：沙漏翻转→沙粒倒出飞向HUD货币栏→金色闪光+星星粒子→翻回空态
states.visual: 翻转动画：沙漏旋转180°（0.4s），沙粒从瓶口飞出为金色圆点粒子向HUD方向飞去（0.6s），白色+金色闪光（0.2s）
states.animation: claim_sequence: 1) rotate_180deg 0.4s ease-in-out → 2) particle_burst 金币粒子飞向HUD 0.6s → 3) flash_sparkle 白金闪 0.2s → 4) fade_to_empty 0.3s
states.prompt: Island-themed hourglass CLAIMED state, 160×200px, transparent background. Hourglass tipped/rotated, warm amber sand pouring out as golden coin particles. Bright white-gold sparkle flash effect. Multiple small coin particle dots flying upward. Pure celebration moment. Hand-drawn watercolor style, dynamic action pose.
states.negative_prompt: pixel art, neon, pure black, sharp corners, hyper-realistic 3D

validation_checks: 空态与满态在视觉上差异明显（沙粒位置+光晕有无）
满态徽章在64px缩略图下仍可见
四个状态风格一致（同一玻璃瓶形态）
claimed态粒子方向清晰（向上飞向HUD）
温暖琥珀色与岛屿风格UI调色板协调

shop_item_icons.note: 商店道具图标：重排/预判/续关三件道具需要独立大图标（用于商店面板列表行）

items.name: 重排道具图标
items.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor game item icon, 96×96px, transparent background. Swirling ocean wave / vortex shuffle icon. Warm teal-ocean color #5BBFB5, white foam highlights, organic rounded swirl shape. Island theme. Readable at 48px. No text.
items.negative_prompt: pixel art, neon, metallic, pure black, sharp corners, text

items.name: 预判道具图标
items.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor game item icon, 96×96px, transparent background. Glowing eye or lighthouse beam icon for hint. Warm golden #F5C842 light ray, soft teal eye shape or lamp. Organic hand-drawn outlines. Island theme. Readable at 48px. No text.
items.negative_prompt: pixel art, neon, metallic, pure black, sharp corners, text

items.name: 续关道具图标
items.prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor game item icon, 96×96px, transparent background. +5 steps bonus icon — sandal footprints or footstep track with +5 indicator area, warm coral color #E8866A. Organic rounded shape. Island beach theme. Readable at 48px. No text or numbers baked in.
items.negative_prompt: pixel art, neon, metallic, pure black, sharp corners, text

other_assets.note: canonical_registry.other[] 包含 18 张章节背景（bg_*）和 2 个道具（prop_*）。背景由 environment-art-gen 节点负责生成，此处仅记录规格约束以供 ui-art-gen HUD 层级对接使用。

backgrounds.ui_interface: 背景最大不透明度装饰叠加 15%，不干扰棋盘可读性

props.name: ひなた手账
props.spec_summary: 180×240px 手账道具。两态：closed（封面可见，手绘风格本子，暖棕色/奶油白配色，封面有日文手写字）/ open（翻开状，内页有ひなた的手写笔记和小插图）。手绘水彩质感，有机轮廓，非纯黑描边。透明背景。

props.name: 灯塔灯
props.spec_summary: 256×256px 灯塔灯 8 帧动画。旋转金色光束（#F5C842），暖白色光晕（#F5F0E8），手绘玻璃灯罩有机形态。8帧循环，每帧对应光束旋转角度递进 45°。透明背景。

ui_elements_atlas.note: 所有 UI 资产打包至单一 ui_elements_atlas，2x 设计尺寸，1x 回退；章节背景单独分章节 atlas（environment-art-gen 负责）

checks_passed: color: 主色板已定义（island_sand / coral / ocean_teal / golden_hour / night_indigo）
image_generation_constraints: positive + negative 均已定义

portrait_generation_scope.note: UI中涉及角色头像的场景：NPC对话框角色立绘区（左侧头像/半身像）。具体肖像规格在 portrait-spec.json 中定义，此处仅标注 UI 对接锚点。
portrait_generation_scope.ui_anchor: ui_panel_npc_dialogue — 左侧 160×160px 头像区域
